required_exports.name: STAGING_BASE_URL
required_exports.note: Must be the staging Hub API root URL, not the web-app URL.

required_exports.name: PROD_BASE_URL
required_exports.note: Must be the production Hub API root URL and must differ from staging.

required_exports.name: BETA_KEY
required_exports.note: Must be exported explicitly in the shell; .env values are intentionally ignored.

required_exports.name: EMAILDJ_EXPECTED_PRESET_PREVIEW_PIPELINE
required_exports.note: Keep off for limited rollout unless preview is intentionally enabled.

required_exports.name: VITE_HUB_URL
required_exports.note: Build-time Hub API root for web-app and extension release verification.

required_exports.name: VITE_EMAILDJ_BETA_KEY
required_exports.note: Build-time beta key for extension release verification.

required_exports.name: VITE_PRESET_PREVIEW_PIPELINE
required_exports.note: Build-time preview-pipeline flag for web-app release verification.

dashboard_inputs.name: WEB_APP_ORIGIN
dashboard_inputs.note: Candidate was discovered from GitHub/Vercel deployment metadata; still operator-owned and must be pinned in the Hub API deployment dashboard.

open_blockers.requirement: Operator exports staging/prod Hub API roots and one explicit deployed beta key.
Capture staging and production runtime snapshots.
Pin deployed web/extension origins, non-dev beta keys, and real provider mode.
Use durable Redis/Postgres/pgvector instead of local or in-memory state.
Prove deployed web generate/remix coverage against staging; require preview smoke only when preview is enabled.
Prove the Chrome extension flow against the real shipped extension origin.
Launch-check itself must no longer report Not yet launch-ready.

blocker_clearance_plan.action: Export STAGING_BASE_URL, PROD_BASE_URL, and BETA_KEY on the operator machine, then run make launch-preflight.
blocker_clearance_plan.evidence: hub-api/reports/launch/preflight.json has ready=true and no missing_inputs.

blocker_clearance_plan.action: Run make launch-verify-deployed after the operator exports are set; it captures staging and production runtime snapshots with the deployed beta key.
blocker_clearance_plan.evidence: hub-api/reports/launch/runtime_snapshots/staging.json and production.json exist and share comparable release fingerprint fields.

blocker_clearance_plan.action: Set WEB_APP_ORIGIN, CHROME_EXTENSION_ORIGIN, EMAILDJ_WEB_BETA_KEYS, EMAILDJ_REAL_PROVIDER, OPENAI_API_KEY, USE_PROVIDER_STUB=0, and EMAILDJ_WEB_RATE_LIMIT_PER_MIN in the deployment dashboard.
blocker_clearance_plan.evidence: launch latest shows web_app_origin_state=explicit_pinned, chrome_extension_origin_state=explicit_pinned, beta_keys_state=explicit_pinned, and effective_provider_source=external_provider.

blocker_clearance_plan.action: Provision managed Redis and Postgres, set REDIS_URL and DATABASE_URL, set VECTOR_STORE_BACKEND=pgvector, and keep REDIS_FORCE_INMEMORY unset or 0.
Run make launch-verify-deployed against staging. Default limited rollout proves generate and remix; use EMAILDJ_DEPLOYED_SMOKE_FLOWS=generate,remix,preview only when preview is intentionally enabled.
blocker_clearance_plan.evidence: hub-api/debug_runs/smoke/deployed/summary.json proves external_provider traffic and green required route coverage.

blocker_clearance_plan.action: Capture both staging and production runtime snapshots from deployed services after release metadata is available.
blocker_clearance_plan.evidence: launch latest has release_fingerprint_parity.runtime_source_used from deployed snapshots and non-empty comparison_fields.

blocker_clearance_plan.action: Set CHROME_EXTENSION_ORIGIN to the shipped chrome-extension://<extension-id> and verify the side-panel flow in Chrome.
blocker_clearance_plan.evidence: launch latest shows chrome_extension_origin_state=explicit_pinned and the extension release config passes.

blocker_clearance_plan.action: After clearing the blocker groups above, rerun make launch-audit and make launch-handoff.
blocker_clearance_plan.evidence: completion_audit.json final_status=complete and launch latest no longer says Not yet launch-ready.

deployment_discovery.launch_blocker_note: Deployment metadata only identifies candidate web origins. It does not clear launch blockers until the Hub API deployment pins WEB_APP_ORIGIN, CHROME_EXTENSION_ORIGIN, beta keys, provider mode, and fresh runtime snapshots.
